title: Local authority statistics: March 2026 quarter | Stats NZ
content:
## Local authority statistics: March 2026 quarter
10 June 2026, 10:45am
Local authority statistics provides information on the performance of core non-trading activities of New Zealand's territorial and regional councils.

## Definitions and metadata
Local authority statistics – DataInfo+ explains general methodology and provides more information on the data and tables.
Local authority statistics concepts – DataInfo+ defines the terms used in this release.
Local authority statistics income and expenditure – DataInfo+ defines the income and expenditure variables used in this release.
